contributions: In A Box (Multi-Agent System): Built and deployed a scalable multi-agent workflow to automate complex multi-document verification across 50+ checkpoints, achieving a 67% reduction in manual processing effort. Built a large-scale orchestration graph using LangGraph for Loan Modification workflows, integrated multiple enterprise systems (FileNet, LSAMS, CMOD), implemented cross-verification pipelines across 5+ document types, and enabled real-time state tracking and persistence via MCP tools interacting with backend services (.NET).

PyroAI Docs (GenAI Extraction): Built a production-grade LLM-based document extraction system, improving accuracy from 9% to 90% and enabling straight-through processing across 15+ financial document types while handling 2000+ pages/day. Migrated legacy deep learning pipelines to LLM-driven architectures, engineered optimized prompt pipelines for diverse document formats and edge cases, and reduced monthly cloud infrastructure costs from $30K+ to < $10K while decreasing dependency on human-in-the-loop operations.

AI Guardian (LLM Validation): Led the development of a scalable LLM evaluation and validation framework to benchmark production models against external competitors. Built backend services using FastAPI, Docker, and GKE, and enabled systematic performance tracking and comparison across multiple dimensions using LLM-as-judge, Cosine Similarity, and Levenshtein Distance metrics.

Idea-Code (Autonomous PDLC): Architected a LangGraph Deepagent pipeline using Azure/GitHub MCP servers to automate the product development lifecycle from concept to GitHub PRs. Orchestrated autonomous generation of BRDs, architectures, and ADO tasks, streamlining the transition from requirements to production code.
Delivered a Gemini-based document extraction proof-of-concept, achieving a 10x accuracy improvement and establishing the foundation for production adoption.
